it boosts stuff that rely on an awaker's attack stat
but isnt suffering's end just furnace hp amount
Suffering's End is kind of weird in how it works.
Attack Potency boosts Base Attack, Poison, Counter, and initial Tentacle Damage.
But i'm not sure if Base Attack means like, the literal Attack Attribute or Base Damage.
just check the sufferings end dmg and see if its still 9x hp
Well, Suffering's End has 3 components to it's damage.

Attack power * 0.9
plus 1 point per furnace gained this battle
if exorcism is picked, +3 times (9 times in boss fights) furnace spent.
But it's all printed on the actual card when you hold it/when you pick Exorcism.
oh so its just (base dmg*atk potency + strength) * 0.9 * 9
It's ((0.9 x Attack) + (1 x Furnace Points gained this battle) + (either 3 or 9 x Furnace Spent))
It's just whether or not that whole formula is multiplied by Attack Potency or not.
atk potency is always only the first part before strength is factored in
42 scarlet furnace hp, 0 strength, 0 cards, 0 atk potency
42 scarlet furnace hp, 0 strength, 1 card for 14.4% atk potency
that atk potency increased dmg by 5
Is this on a boss or no?
Just trying to work out which things it is affecting.
i used the edify mat boss
strength seems to add directly to the final number
idk what atk potency is doing but its certainly pretty mid
Right, so Exorcism contributes uh... 378 of that damage, so base + furnace is 73 damage.
Is this a rank 6 Suffering's End? And I'm assuming the 42 Furnace is gained directly in the fight.
If so, then yeah, 14.4 is probably just adding to the regular base damage, I think.
If that's the case I'm probably better off ignoring Attack Potency.
Since at that point honestly Black Sigil might be better even if the benefit on cap is miniscule.
14.4% of 41 is roughly 6 so that tracks.
i didnt level him much, lv40
Might be rounding down so yeah looks to just be hitting base damage I think.
base dmg * atk potency + (whatever modifiers furnace has on this)*9 + strength
not exactly sure how furnace formula works cause 41+378 isnt 451
does atk potency apply to the part of sufferings end that scales off of furnace gained?
You get a percentage of total furnace gained in the fight too.
In the case of rank 1 skill, 75%

Hi!
Do we have any guides for common/event shops items priority?

As for the healing, yes there is a consideration to not press it every turn, firstly caro characters benefit from being at low health since their cards that consume hp to use take away less health when you're at low health since it's current hp based some characters like Uvhash just in general favour being at a low health

Unless it's full or you desperately need the healing I don't think there's a reason to click it as usually leigh can heal you sufficiently if you exalt devour with her since devour heals you extra based on lost hp

Don't believe there are any enemies that have any effects that would be bad for you if you were at low hp anyways well aside from injury but that also reduces healing so as long as you're not dying should wait it out so you can get the full effect
If you're under the bleeding effect though you could consider it since healing removes bleed stacks
